response.step_by_step_log: The video was reviewed to identify any vocal music performances. The video is a promotional clip for a concert event, 'hololive GAMERS fes.'. The audio consists of instrumental music and crowd noise during a countdown. No vocal music or singing occurs in this segment, so no song metadata was resolved or searched for.
response.global_summary: The video shows a countdown event leading up to the 'hololive GAMERS fes.' concert, featuring the four members of hololive GAMERS (Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, and Inugami Korone). The footage consists of a static promotional graphic with an instrumental track, followed by a wide shot of a stadium crowd holding light sticks during the countdown from 10 to 1, with no singing. There is no actual vocal music or song performance in this video clip.

scenes.description: Static promotional graphic for 'hololive GAMERS fes.' featuring the four members of hololive GAMERS. Instrumental background music plays.
Wide shot of a stadium audience holding light sticks during a countdown from 10 to 1. No vocal music.
